Game.Name: Super Puyo Puyo Tsuu Remix (Japan)
Game.plot: Super Puyo Puyo Tsuu Remix is a Miscellaneous game, developed and published by Compile,which was released in Japan in 1996.Cheat: Select stage in Continuous ModeIn the Single Player mode selection screen, when about to select Continuous Mode, hold the L + R buttons and press Start to be able to select any of the 33 stages in Continuous ModeCheat: Masked SatanAttain at least 180,000 Experience points in the standard Story Mode without using a continue after you defeat Rulue to battle Masked Satan instead of regular Satan as your final opponent. Defeat him to view a different, better ending.Cheat: Masked SatanWhen you're in the ranking screen (after getting a Game Over or after completing the game), press and hold L+R+START simultaneously. You will go to a screen with several game options, like Key Assignment, Endless Mode Level and others.
